meta.description: Target filesystem structure for Logger_Adapter after roadmap completion

status_legend.new: Brand new file, no existing source
status_legend.extracted: Split from an existing file into its own unit
status_legend.modified: Existing file that will be extended
status_legend.unchanged: Existing file with no planned changes
status_legend.deprecated: Existing file that will be phased out

config.description: Configuration data structures — all pure structs/enums, no logic

LoggingConfig.hpp.description: Central config struct; aggregates LoggerEntry[], BacktraceConfig, QueueConfig, PatternConfig, error_callback, stderr, eventlog, backend_cpu_affinity via #include
LoggingConfig.hpp.action: Extend to #include sub-config headers; keep as the single entry-point config header

LoggerEntry.hpp.description: struct LoggerEntry — per-logger name, log_level, sink enable flags, backtrace override
LoggerEntry.hpp.action: Extract from LoggingConfig.hpp into its own header

BacktraceConfig.hpp.action: Extract from LoggingConfig.hpp into its own header

QueueConfig.hpp.description: struct QueueConfig + QueueOverflowPolicy enum — queue_type, initial_capacity, max_capacity, retry_interval_ns

PatternConfig.hpp.description: struct PatternConfig — format string, timestamp_pattern, utc flag
PatternConfig.hpp.action: Extract from LoggingConfig.hpp into its own header

setup.description: Initialization, teardown, and logger registry — the orchestration layer

LoggerSetup.hpp.description: InitializeLogging() + ShutdownLogging() — orchestrates SinkFactory sink creation → LoggerRegistry logger creation → Backend::start
LoggerSetup.hpp.action: Extract from logging/LoggerSetup.hpp into setup/; delegate sink creation to SinkFactory, logger creation to LoggerRegistry

LoggerRegistry.hpp.description: GetLogger(name, level) → lookup/create named logger; FlushBacktrace(logger); root_logger_ptr() access
LoggerRegistry.hpp.action: Extract GetLogger logic from LoggerSetup.hpp into its own header

SinkFactory.hpp.description: CreateConsoleSink(), CreateFileSink(), CreateRotatingFileSink(), CreateJsonFileSink(), CreateStderrSink(), CreateEventLogSink() — all sink creation logic in one place
SinkFactory.hpp.action: Extract sink-instantiation code from LoggerSetup.hpp into its own header

macros.description: All logging macros and their function template variants — one concern per file

Core.hpp.description: Central #include that aggregates all macros/*.hpp; provides LOG_LEVEL() runtime macro; respects QUILL_COMPILE_ACTIVE_LOG_LEVEL
Core.hpp.action: Extract the umbrella include and LOG_LEVEL macro from HotPathLogger.hpp

Standard.hpp.description: #define LOG_TRACE(logger, fmt, ...) / LOG_DEBUG / LOG_INFO / LOG_WARN / LOG_ERR / LOG_CRIT + function template LogInfo(..) etc.

VariableArgs.hpp.description: #define LOGV_TRACE(logger, ...) .. LOGV_CRIT + function template LogVInfo(..) — auto-captures variable names

Structured.hpp.description: #define LOGJ_TRACE(logger, ...) .. LOGJ_CRIT — deferred JSON formatting on JsonFileSink

RateLimited.hpp.description: #define LOG_INFO_LIMIT(interval, logger, ...) / LOG_INFO_EVERY_N(n, logger, ...) + all 6 levels — rate-limited and every-N throttling

sinks.description: Custom sink implementations (beyond Quill's built-in sinks)

EventLogSink.hpp.description: class EventLogSink : public quill::Sink — declaration; write/flush_sink overrides

windows.description: Windows-native API wrappers for POSIX-only Quill features

ThreadAffinity.hpp.description: PinCurrentThreadToCore(core_index) / SetCurrentThreadAffinity(mask) via SetThreadAffinityMask — inline header-only

error.description: Error handling types — Result monad, error codes, error context

ErrorContext.hpp.description: struct ErrorContext — code, file, line, function, message, timestamp — unchanged

Result.hpp.description: Result<T> + ResultVoid — adds value_or(), and_then(), map(), or_else() (M09) + guarded access with debug assertions (M10)
Result.hpp.action: Extend with monadic methods + debug assertions

emergency.description: Emergency subsystem — crash handling, health probes, graceful shutdown

EmergencyConfig.hpp.description: struct EmergencyConfig — will remove unused shutdown_timeout_ms field

EmergencyManager.hpp.description: EmergencyManager — adds Reset(), SetEmergencyMode() (M11) + backtrace flush before FatalError (C03)
EmergencyManager.hpp.action: Add Reset/SetEmergencyMode methods; wire backtrace flush in FatalError

CrashHandler.hpp.description: CrashHandler — remove MakeSignalHandlerOptions, SetupCrashLogger if they remain unused; or wire them up
CrashHandler.hpp.action: Clean up dead code (Option A: wire or Option B: remove)

GracefulShutdown.hpp.description: GracefulShutdown — orderly shutdown sequence with timeout — unchanged

Logger_Adapter.cpp.description: Translation unit — #include <quill/core/Codec.h> to instantiate backend; unchanged

Logger_Adapter.vcxproj.description: Project file — add QUILL_COMPILE_ACTIVE_LOG_LEVEL preprocessor defines per configuration
Logger_Adapter.vcxproj.action: Add preprocessor definitions for compile-time log level

Logger_Adapter.vcxproj.filters.description: Filters file — add new folders (config, setup, macros, sinks, windows) and file entries

pch.h.description: Precompiled header — optionally add <quill/std/*.h> for STL type logging

logging.description: LEGACY — existing folder; files will be redistributed to config/, setup/, macros/

HotPathLogger.hpp.description: Will be replaced by macros/Core.hpp + macros/Standard.hpp + macros/VariableArgs.hpp + macros/Structured.hpp + macros/RateLimited.hpp + macros/Backtrace.hpp
HotPathLogger.hpp.action: Deprecate; keep as thin re-export umbrella during transition, then remove

LoggerSetup.hpp.description: Will be replaced by setup/LoggerSetup.hpp + setup/LoggerRegistry.hpp + setup/SinkFactory.hpp
LoggerSetup.hpp.action: Deprecate; split into setup/ files, then remove

LoggingConfig.hpp.description: Will be replaced by config/LoggingConfig.hpp (umbrella) + config/LoggerEntry.hpp + config/BacktraceConfig.hpp + config/QueueConfig.hpp + config/PatternConfig.hpp
LoggingConfig.hpp.action: Deprecate; split into config/ files, then remove

StructuredLogger.hpp.description: LogStructured function — marked deprecated in favor of LOGJ_* macros; remove after M04 transition period
StructuredLogger.hpp.action: Mark deprecated; remove after M04 is stable
